description: A candid documentary photograph of a law-enforcement arrest in an outdoor parking lot on an overcast day, with an autumn tree and a black SUV in the background. In the center stands a detained man (per the tweet, Andres Mendoza Salomon) wearing a brown t-shirt, an open plaid flannel shirt, a cross necklace, light cargo pants and white sneakers, with his hands apparently restrained behind him. Flanking him are two officers in tactical gear with balaclavas/face coverings and tan plate-carrier vests with rifle magazine pouches; the officer on the left has 'FBI' printed on the back of his vest. There is no on-image text overlay, slogan, seal graphic or designed layout—it is a straight operational photo—so it is not a designed meme/graphic. The accompanying tweet supplies the framing (labeling the man a registered sex offender and 'criminal alien' arrested by ICE/ERO Los Angeles). Marked is_designed=false (candid photo).
notable_text: FBI (printed on officer's vest; no agency-added overlay text)
